sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الخَطُّ العَرَبِيُّ فَنًّا بَصَرِيًّا فَرِيدًا يَمْزِجُ بَيْنَ الجَمَالِ الهَنْدَسِيِّ وَالرُّوحَانِيَّةِ العَمِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija se smatra jedinstvenom vizuelnom umjetnošću koja spaja geometrijsku ljepotu i duboku duhovnost.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is considered a unique visual art that blends geometric beauty with deep spirituality.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الخَطُّ مُجَرَّدَ وَسِيلَةٍ لِلتَّدْوِينِ، بَلْ تَطَوَّرَ لِيُصْبِحَ عَمَلًا فَنِّيًّا يُزَيِّنُ المَسَاجِدَ وَالقُصُورَ وَالمَخْطُوطَاتِ القَدِيمَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kaligrafija nije bila samo sredstvo za pisanje, već se razvila u umjetničko djelo koje ukrašava džamije, palate i drevne rukopise.
sentences.translationEn: Calligraphy was not merely a means for recording, but evolved to become an art work decorating mosques, palaces, and ancient manuscripts.

sentences.arabic: تَتَعَدَّدُ أَنْوَاعُ الخُطُوطِ مِثْلَ الثُّلُثِ وَالنَّسْخِ وَالكُوفِيِّ، وَلِكُلِّ نَوْعٍ قَوَاعِدُهُ الصَّارِمَةُ وَجَمَالِيَّاتُهُ الخَاصَّةُ.
sentences.translation: Postoje brojni tipovi pisama poput Thulutha, Naskha i Kufija, a svaki tip ima svoja stroga pravila i posebnu estetiku.
sentences.translationEn: There are numerous types of scripts such as Thuluth, Naskh, and Kufi, and each type has its strict rules and special aesthetics.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ إِتْقَانُ هَذَا الفَنِّ صَبْرًا طَوِيلًا وَمُمَارَسَةً مُسْتَمِرَّةً لِلتَّحَكُّمِ فِي انْسِيَابِيَّةِ الحِبْرِ عَلَى الوَرَقِ.
sentences.translation: Ovladavanje ovom umjetnošću zahtijeva dugo strpljenje i neprekidnu vježbu kako bi se kontrolisao protok tinte na papiru.
sentences.translationEn: Mastering this art requires long patience and continuous practice to control the flow of ink on paper.

sentences.arabic: فِي العَصْرِ الحَدِيثِ، دَمَجَ الفَنَّانُونَ العَرَبُ الخَطَّ فِي الفُنُونِ التَّشْكِيلِيَّةِ المُعَاصِرَةِ، مِمَّا أَعْطَاهُ أَبْعَادًا جَدِيدَةً وَمُبْتَكَرَةً.
sentences.translation: U modernom dobu, arapski umjetnici su integrisali kaligrafiju u savremenu likovnu umjetnost, dajući joj nove i inovativne dimenzije.
sentences.translationEn: In the modern era, Arab artists integrated calligraphy into contemporary fine arts, giving it new and innovative dimensions.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا، يَظَلُّ الخَطُّ العَرَبِيُّ شَاهِدًا حَيًّا عَلَى عَبْقَرِيَّةِ الحَضَارَةِ الإِسْلَامِيَّةِ وَتَطَوُّرِهَا الجَمَالِيِّ عَبْرَ العُصُورِ.
sentences.translation: Tako arapska kaligrafija ostaje živi svjedok genijalnosti islamske civilizacije i njenog estetskog razvoja kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, Arabic calligraphy remains a living witness to the genius of Islamic civilization and its aesthetic development through the ages.
